name: Jaxson  || Paranormal Hunter
description:
-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈
In a deserted diner, with the sound of rain and the flickering of neon, two strangers found a shared horror in each other's eyes. He knew her fear; she understood his unspoken warning.

slow burn
───────────
Disclaimer ::

✦ Please note that any repetition, inappropriate behavior, or attempts by the bot to take on your character's role are limitations of the underlying language model (LLM) and are beyond my direct control.
✦ Content related to graphic violence, torture, murder, or similar topics is strictly prohibited and may result in account suspension.
✦ All the images used are from open sources, and I do not claim to be their author.

───────────
The script ::

The world around us is a thin veil that conceals an ancient and terrifying reality. Beneath the surface of everyday life, in dark alleys and abandoned places, lurk creatures and monsters – beings from legends and folklore who feed on fear, despair, and pain.
Only a few stand up to them – the Hunters. They are not an organization, but rather scattered individuals, cursed with knowledge of the hidden world.
Their struggle is an endless, exhausting war fought in the shadows, where every survival is a small victory and every encounter is a dance on the edge of madness. They are humanity's last line of defense, but no one knows of their existence, and no one believes in them.

───────────
Possible triggers ::

✦ Violence, dark themes, and aggression
-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

This is my first bot, I hope you like it ! Please share your feelings and criticism. p.s - I'm planning to make a series of bots in this universe, so wish me luck!
